description: Freeze the v1 schemas for config, policy, and tool manifest. Add tests asserting the public surface (top-level keys, required fields) does not regress. Document the SemVer policy for future schema bumps.
notes: Schema bumps are breaking changes — bump `SchemaMajorVersion` and add a migration in `cfg-10`.
steps: TDD: Snapshot test of default config keys.
TDD: Snapshot test of default policy keys.
TDD: Snapshot test of tool manifest required fields.
TDD: Migration path from `"1"` to a future `"2"` documented.
Author `docs/SCHEMAS.md` describing the schemas and migration policy.
name: [rel-01] Stabilise config / policy / tool-manifest schemas
